Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jonathan Bowne, Esq. appeared with plaintiff James Leung, dba Mei Designs.
No appearance by defendant Albert Leung.
Default was entered against defendant on September 17, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 4, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff James Leung, dba Mei Designs, and against the Defaulted Defendant Albert Leung as follows:

Damages/Principal - $85,137.54.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived, plaintiff seeks statutory penalties.
Attorney's Fees - $4,077.25.
Prompt Payment Penalties pursuant to Civil Code Sections 3260(g) & 3260.1 - $63,334.70.
Costs - $749.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $153,298.49.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
